role_summary: Project convention guide and architectural blueprint that standardizes development workflows, technology stacks, and quality assurance protocols for both human developers and AI coding agents.
extracted_finding: Defines mandatory structural standards including a standardized repository layout, deterministic package management (uv/pnpm), and a FastAPI/PostgreSQL backend with React or NiceGUI frontends. Establishes strict operational rules: ≥85% test coverage requirements, automated pre-commit/pre-push quality gates, conventional commit formatting, and CI/CD pipelines that enforce build and test success. Outlines an agentic development workflow featuring isolated Git worktrees, parallel execution constraints, timeout recovery procedures, and explicit anti-pattern avoidance. Functional responsibilities are partitioned across auto-discovered API routing, Pydantic-based centralized configuration, service-layer business logic isolation, and containerized Kubernetes deployments managed via Helm charts.
